defaults.hook_text: BARCELONA SIGNED HIM ON A NAPKIN
defaults.hook_cover_term: a close-up photo of Lionel Messi's face celebrating

videos.video_subject: How Barcelona signed a young Lionel Messi on a paper napkin after no one else would pay for his treatment
videos.video_script: This kid was told he would never grow tall enough to play football. At eleven, Lionel Messi was diagnosed with a growth disorder. The treatment cost nine hundred dollars a month, and his family couldn't afford it. Every big club in Argentina said no. Then Barcelona flew him to Spain. Their director was so stunned by him that he was terrified of losing him. But there was no contract paper in the restaurant. So he grabbed a napkin, and wrote the deal on it. Barcelona promised to pay for the injections that would let him grow. That napkin turned a sick little boy into the greatest footballer who ever lived. Eight Ballon d'Ors. A World Cup. All because of a napkin.
